raw_calls.callee:
await db.prepare(`
    SELECT p.*, pm.name as printer_model_name
    FROM printers p
    LEFT JOIN printer_models pm ON p.printer_model_id = pm.id
  `).all

await db.prepare(`
    SELECT id, printer_id, started_at, ended_at, note
    FROM printer_downtime
    WHERE started_at < ?
      AND (ended_at IS NULL OR ended_at > ?)
  `).bind(periodEnd, periodStart).all

await db.prepare(`
    SELECT
      pj.*,
      pm.name as module_name,
      pm.expected_time
    FROM print_jobs pj
    LEFT JOIN print_modules pm ON pj.module_id = pm.id
    ORDER BY pj.start_time DESC
  `).all
